'''savaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnidian|arachnidian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnidian|arachnidian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| savaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || sævækæth || sævækæj || sævækæsh || sævækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || savavakath || savavakaj || savavakash || savavaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || savakath || savakaj || savakash || savaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || savafkafth || savafkafj || savafkafsh || savafkaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || savakatha || savakaja || savakasha || savakaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || savakath || savakaj || savakash || savaka
|-
| [[Possessive]] || savakathal || savakajal || savakashal || savakakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || savakaathatha || savakaajaja || savakaashasha || savakaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || savakathan || savakajan || savakashan || savakakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || savakathaoro || savakajaoro || savakashaoro || savakakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
